title: Supreme Court goes fully virtual twice a week amid PM Modi’s appeal to save fuel
description: The Supreme Court has decided to conduct hearings exclusively through video conference on Mondays and Fridays amid Prime Minister Narendra Modi's appeal to save fuel due to economic fallout of the West Asia crisis. The Court has also said that it will adopt a hybrid mode of hearing cases from Tuesday to Thursday every week. Under the revised arrangement, all hearings on Mondays and Fridays will take place exclusively online. On Tuesdays, Wednesdays and Thursdays, lawyers and litigants will have
